word: G1796 - ἐνυβρίζω - enybrízō - en-oo-brid'-zo - Do despite unto

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐνυβρίζω

- Transliteration: Enubrizo

- Phonetic: en-oo-brid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to insult

- Origin: from G1722 and G5195

- TDNT entry: 12:55,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and G5195; to insult: - do despite unto.
